title: Access to files column asset version history via API?
excerpt:
How can I access information about file assets version history from a files column through the API? 
Information like, does a version history exist, what’s the latest version, the previous, a total # of versions, etc?

posts.author: Spunkie (Spunkie)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I access information about file assets version history from a files column through the API?

Information like, does a version history exist, what’s the latest version, the previous, a total # of versions, etc?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Spunkie,

Thanks for the question!

This information is currently not supported by the API. We have it in the backlog, but there’s no ETA.

Keep following the community or changelog for announcements when it is eventually released!

Best,
Rachel
